title: meliosma pinnata subsp. humilis
intro: Meliosma pinnata subsp. humilis, also known as the dwarf meliosma, is a plant species in the Meliosmaceae family that is native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, which contribute to its ability to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential and optimal uses.
